sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Watkins Advises Ascendant Capital Partners in Acquisition of Sotherly Hotels Inc.
feed.summary: Latham & Watkins LLP advised Ascendant Capital Partners in its acquisition of Sotherly Hotels Inc. through a joint venture with Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners. The merger, valued at US$2.25 per share for all outstanding common stock, received approval from Sotherly stockholders and board of directors. This acquisition expands Ascendant Capital Partners' hospitality portfolio.

feed.title: Personalis, Inc. (NASDAQ:PSNL) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Personalis, Inc. (NASDAQ:PSNL) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from eight brokerages, with an average one-year price target of $10.86. Key analysts like Morgan Stanley, Guggenheim, and BTIG recently raised their price targets for the stock. Despite a recent insider stock sale by CFO Aaron Tachibana, institutional investors hold a significant portion of the company's shares.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage (EXR) Maintains Quarterly Dividend at $1.62/Share
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage (EXR) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.62 per share, maintaining its previous payout, which results in a 4.43% forward yield. The company demonstrates strong profitability but faces concerns regarding its declining operating margin and Altman Z-Score indicating potential distress. While institutional ownership is high, suggesting investor confidence, the stock's valuation metrics suggest it is trading at a premium.

feed.title: Church & Dwight stock rating upgraded by Rothschild Redburn to Neutral
feed.summary: Rothschild Redburn has upgraded Church & Dwight Co. Inc. (NYSE:CHD) from Sell to Neutral, raising its price target from $81.00 to $91.00. This shift comes after a previously cautious stance, with the firm now becoming more constructive on the company's outlook despite past concerns about slowing growth and share losses in some Power Brands. The upgrade follows Church & Dwight's strong fourth-quarter earnings report, which also led to price target increases from UBS, TD Cowen, and JPMorgan, indicating a mixed but largely positive analyst sentiment.

feed.title: PPG Industries Stock: Quiet Compounder Or Cyclical Trap? What The Latest Numbers Reveal
feed.summary: PPG Industries (PPG) is navigating a sluggish industrial market by strategically reshaping its portfolio, boosting margins, and focusing on higher-value, technology-driven solutions. Despite not being a deep-value play or a momentum stock, PPG has shown resilient earnings and steady price increases, leading Wall Street analysts to generally rate it as a "Buy" or "Overweight" with moderate upside potential. The company's future strategy involves refining its portfolio towards specialty coatings, maintaining cost discipline, and fostering innovation, positioning it as a potential quiet compounder rather than a cyclical trap.

feed.title: Castagnetto of CH Robinson buys shares worth $99,999
feed.summary: Michael D. Castagnetto of C. H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) recently bought 594.388 shares for nearly $100,000. This purchase increased his direct and indirect holdings in the company. The article also notes a previous short-swing transaction for which Castagnetto paid the company $15,430.32 in profit.

feed.title: Microchip Technology Targets Edge AI Servers And EVs With New Push
feed.summary: Microchip Technology recently expanded its offerings in edge AI solutions, power modules for AI servers, and automotive connectivity through a collaboration with Hyundai Motor Group. These strategic moves aim to strengthen the company's presence in industrial, data center, and automotive markets. While these initiatives provide growth opportunities, investors should consider Microchip's significant debt and limited dividend coverage from earnings.

feed.title: Federal Realty (FRT) Reports Q4 FFO Loss Challenging Bullish Narratives On Earnings Quality
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) reported mixed Q4 FY 2025 results, with revenue of US$334.4 million but a significant Funds From Operations loss of US$465.1 million, impacted by a US$142.7 million one-off gain. While the company saw 41% earnings growth, analysts forecast a 3.7% annual decline over the next three years, raising questions about the sustainability of recent profitability. The stock's current P/E of 22.4x is below the industry average, and despite a DCF fair value of US$147.39, concerns about earnings quality and interest coverage persist.

feed.title: A Look At U.S. Bancorp (USB) Valuation After Recent Insider Selling By Senior Executives
feed.summary: Recent insider selling at U.S. Bancorp by senior executives is drawing attention, especially given the bank's mixed short-term stock performance but strong long-term momentum. Despite being undervalued according to analyst price targets and intrinsic value, the article highlights potential risks like commercial real estate exposure and cybersecurity costs. It also encourages investors to build custom narratives and explore other investment opportunities through the Simply Wall St screener.

feed.title: Assessing Revvity (RVTY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Revvity's stock has seen recent weakness, declining 13.89% over the past month, but is currently indicated as undervalued by Simply Wall St's models. The company's valuation is driven by an ongoing shift towards higher margin, recurring revenue products and services, with an estimated fair value of US$114.63 against its current US$96.03 share price. However, investors face risks including regulatory changes in China and a high P/E ratio compared to the sector average.

feed.title: Nvidia (NVDA) Falls 2% as AMD Gains on Arista Deployment Update
feed.summary: Nvidia (NVDA) shares dropped 2% ahead of its earnings report, while rival AMD climbed following remarks from Arista Networks' CEO about a shift in customer deployments towards AMD-based solutions. This indicates a broader pivot in AI investing from focusing on training dominance to the "Second Wave of AI," where inference efficiency and cost control are prioritizing. AMD is positioning itself as a value challenger in AI inference, benefiting from enterprises seeking cost-effective solutions as AI workloads mature.

feed.title: Nasdaq warns IO Biotech (NASDAQ: IOBT) on $50M market value rule
feed.summary: IO Biotech Inc. (NASDAQ: IOBT) has received a notice from Nasdaq stating it is non-compliant with the requirement to maintain a market value of listed securities of at least $50 million for 30 consecutive business days. The company has 180 calendar days, until August 11, 2026, to regain compliance by having its market value at or above $50 million for at least ten consecutive business days. Failure to comply could lead to delisting, though the company would have an opportunity to appeal.

feed.title: Rollins (ROL) Is Down 10.5% After Q4 Miss Despite Recurring Strength And Active M&A Plans
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. reported a Q4 earnings miss despite a 9.7% year-on-year sales growth, which led to a 10.5% drop in stock value. The company attributed the shortfall to early winter weather affecting one-time projects but highlighted strong recurring revenue and active M&A plans, including nearly $900 million in acquisitions over the past three years. Future growth is expected from ongoing acquisition activities and organic expansion, though analysts are reconsidering long-term forecasts.

feed.title: F5 96 Hour Deadline Alert: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 of Deadline in Class Action Lawsuit Against F5, Inc. - FFIV
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is reminding investors of F5, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FFIV) who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 that they have until February 17, 2026, to file lead plaintiff applications in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that F5 and its executives failed to disclose material information during the Class Period, leading to a significant drop in stock price after the announcement of disappointing fiscal year 2025 results and a security breach. Investors are encouraged to contact KSF to discuss their legal rights and potential recovery.

feed.title: Pacific Biosciences Of California (PACB) Q4 Losses Highlight Ongoing Profitability Concerns Despite Revenue Base
feed.summary: Pacific Biosciences of California (PACB) reported Q4 2025 revenue of US$44.6 million and a basic EPS loss of US$0.13, concluding FY 2025 with US$160.0 million in revenue and a US$1.82 EPS loss. Despite revenue growth, the company faces significant ongoing losses, with trailing losses at US$546.4 million and no profitability expected within the next three years. Analysts anticipate continued revenue growth but remain cautious given the widening losses and the stock's P/S ratio above the industry average.

feed.title: Maase Inc. Files Financials Detailing October 2025 Acquisition of Real Prospect Limited
feed.summary: Maase Inc. has filed financial statements detailing its full acquisition of Real Prospect Limited on October 28, 2025. The company released unaudited pro forma combined statements on February 13, 2026, which illustrate the post-acquisition financial impacts, while also highlighting Real Prospect’s going-concern risks. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates MAAS as Neutral due to growth challenges, consistent losses, and operational inefficiencies.

feed.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (NYSE: PEB) refinances $450M term loan and extends $650M revolver
feed.summary: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust has refinanced its debt, securing a new $450 million senior unsecured term loan and extending its $650 million revolving credit facility. These actions push out debt maturities, reduce secured debt, and provide a clear plan to address $350 million in convertible notes due December 2026. The company's debt profile now features approximately 89% fixed-rate and 98% unsecured debt, with a weighted average interest rate of about 4.4%.

feed.title: Patrick Industries EVP Amundson sells $568k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Stacey L. Amundson, EVP and CHRO of PATRICK INDUSTRIES INC, sold 3,903 shares of common stock for a total of $568,334. The sale occurred on February 12, 2026, at a weighted average price of $145.6148 per share. This transaction follows recent robust financial results for Patrick Industries, which exceeded Q4 2025 earnings and revenue expectations, leading to raised price targets from Benchmark and BMO Capital.

feed.title: Magna International (MGA) Soars to 4-Year High on Revenue Blowout, Buyback
feed.summary: Magna International (MGA) reached a nearly four-year high after reporting strong revenue performance for full-year 2025, hitting the high end of its guidance. Investors reacted positively to the company's financial results and its ongoing share buyback program. Despite a slight decrease in full-year revenue and net income compared to 2024, the company provided an optimistic outlook for 2026 sales and diluted earnings per share.

feed.title: Globe Life EVP Haworth sells $1.43 million in stock
feed.summary: Globe Life's EVP & Chief Marketing Officer, Jennifer Allison Haworth, sold 10,000 shares of company stock for a total of $1.43 million on February 12, 2026. Prior to these sales, she exercised options to acquire the same number of shares for $506,400. Following the transactions, Haworth directly owns 17,479 shares and indirectly owns an additional 1,938.443 shares.

feed.title: Öl-Service (Oilfield Services) by Halliburton: The Quiet Backbone Powering the World’s Energy Tra
feed.summary: This article highlights Halliburton's "Öl-Service" (oilfield services) as a critical, often unseen, component powering the global energy sector, emphasizing its role in risk reduction and efficiency. Halliburton positions itself as an end-to-end technology and services partner throughout the well life cycle, focusing on digital workflows, cost optimization, and lower-carbon solutions including carbon capture and storage. The company aims to provide integrated solutions for complex assets, helping operators manage performance, cost, and ESG targets in a demanding energy landscape.

feed.title: Syracuse wants to break up with Flock. Not so fast, company says.
feed.summary: Syracuse officials are moving to replace their current license plate reader provider, Flock Safety, with Axon Enterprise. However, Flock Safety is threatening to enforce its contract, potentially making Syracuse taxpayers pay for both systems. This comes after ongoing concerns about data sharing, storage, and security with Flock Safety's technology, including its data sharing with federal immigration agents.

feed.title: H&R Block (HRB) Climbs 9.56% on Bargain-Hunting Ahead of Dividends
feed.summary: H&R Block (HRB) saw its stock climb 9.56% to $31.05, recovering from recent losses as investors engaged in bargain-hunting and repositioned for an upcoming dividend payout of $0.42 per share. The company has a history of strong dividend growth, increasing them by 110% since 2016 and returning over $5 billion to shareholders. H&R Block also reported narrowed net losses and increased revenues in Q2 fiscal year 2026, with optimistic revenue and EPS projections for the full year.

feed.title: Kevin Thomas Mcbride Sells 1,400 Shares of ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) Stock
feed.summary: Kevin Thomas Mcbride, an insider at ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW), sold 1,400 shares of the company's stock on February 13th for approximately $147,994, reducing his position by 5.05%. Despite this insider sale and the stock trading below its moving averages, ServiceNow recently exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue expectations. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target significantly higher than the current trading price, while institutional investors hold a large percentage of the shares.

feed.title: Jefferies Deepens SMBC Alliance As Valuation And Dividend Cover Diverge
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group is strengthening its alliance with Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group by nominating Yoshihiro Hyakutome to its Board and working towards a Japan equities joint venture by January 2027. SMBC also plans to increase its stake in Jefferies. While analysts see potential undervaluation, Simply Wall St suggests the shares are above fair value and notes that Jefferies' dividend is not well covered by free cash flows, a critical factor given its reliance on equity partnerships.

feed.title: MITSUI SUMITOMO INSURANCE CO LTD Increases Stake in WR Berkley C
feed.summary: MITSUI SUMITOMO INSURANCE CO LTD, a 10% owner of WR Berkley Corp (WRB), recently purchased 40,000 shares, increasing its total holdings to over 56.5 million shares. This transaction follows a pattern of significant insider buying at WR Berkley, with 15 insider buys and no sells in the past year. The stock is currently trading at $70.93, deemed fairly valued compared to its GF Value, with a P/E ratio higher than the industry median.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Ionis Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:IONS) Director Sells 5,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Ionis Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:IONS) Director B Lynne Parshall sold 5,000 shares of the company's stock on February 11th, reducing her stake by 8.15%. The transaction totaled $413,600, with shares sold at an average price of $82.72. Following the sale, Parshall directly owns 56,344 shares.

feed.title: David Malcom Rodman Sells 14,055 Shares of Mineralys Therapeutics (NASDAQ:MLYS) Stock
feed.summary: David Malcom Rodman, an insider at Mineralys Therapeutics (NASDAQ:MLYS), sold 14,055 shares of the company's stock on February 13th for approximately $385,669. This transaction reduced his direct ownership to 44,089 shares, marking a 24.17% decrease in his stake. The stock traded down 0.9% to $27.60, below its 50- and 200-day moving averages, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $47.43.

feed.title: Cincinnati Financial: How a Quiet Insurer Is Turning Data, Discipline, and Distribution Into a Competitive Edge
feed.summary: Cincinnati Financial is presented as a quiet but powerful insurance platform that leverages data, agency reach, and disciplined underwriting. The article details its integrated product ecosystem, agent-centric design, and strategic investments in technology to navigate rising catastrophe losses and evolving client demands. It also compares Cincinnati Financial's offerings to competitors like Travelers, The Hartford, and Chubb, highlighting its competitive advantages in distribution, underwriting culture, and long-term orientation, which collectively influence its stock valuation.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) CAO Sells 4,442 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises' Chief Accounting Officer, Henry Pujol, sold 4,442 shares of company stock for over $1.45 million, reducing his stake by 30.62%. This insider sale occurred as the company reported strong Q4 earnings, authorized a $2.0 billion share buyback program, and increased its quarterly dividend to $1.50 per share. Despite positive financial performance and analyst sentiment, the stock experienced a 4.1% dip on the day of the sale.

feed.title: Vincent Retort Sells 45,026 Shares of Lumentum (NASDAQ:LITE) Stock
feed.summary: Vincent Retort, an insider at Lumentum Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:LITE), sold 45,026 shares of the company's stock on February 12th, 2026, for over $26.62 million, reducing his stake by 30.53%. This sale occurred despite Lumentum reporting strong quarterly results, exceeding EPS and revenue expectations. The company also provided optimistic Q3 2026 guidance, though its shares experienced a slight decline post-announcement, and the consensus analyst price target is currently below the market price.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: BlackRock Rings Opening Bell to Honor Black History Month
feed.summary: The NYSE issued a pre-market update on February 13, 2026, noting that markets were slipping and BlackRock's Black Professional & Allies Network celebrated U.S. Black History Month by ringing the opening bell. The update also covered a discussion with the CEO of Once Upon A Farm (NYSE: OFRM) and news about Moonpay's partnership with Deel for stablecoin salary payouts, while also celebrating Lunar New Year.

feed.title: Assessing Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (PEB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (PEB) has seen its share price rise by 6% in the last month and 15% over three months. While one valuation narrative suggests the stock is 1.3% overvalued at $12.58 per share, focusing on urban hotel demand recovery, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates the stock is materially undervalued at $18.19 per share. The article encourages investors to conduct their own research and consider risks like exposure to urban markets and rising labor costs.

feed.title: i-80 Gold’s US$500m Deal Resets Balance Sheet And Growth Ambitions
feed.summary: i-80 Gold has secured a US$500 million financing package, including a US$250 million royalty investment from Franco-Nevada, aimed at advancing its Nevada gold projects and refurbishing infrastructure. This deal allows the company to retire existing debt and reshape its balance sheet, signaling an intent to progress its Nevada portfolio toward larger production. The funding provides i-80 Gold with more flexibility for mine development and reduces immediate pressure from debt.

feed.title: Ideal Power Inc Is Exploding In Energy Tech – But Is IPWR Stock A Sneaky 10X Or Total Trap?
feed.summary: Ideal Power Inc. (IPWR) is generating buzz in clean energy circles due to its B-TRAN technology, which promises more efficient power switching for EVs, renewables, and industrial systems. While early-stage and high-risk, the company's focus on intellectual property and its potential to disrupt the power electronics market make it a compelling speculative investment for those with a long-term outlook, despite strong competition from established players. Investors are advised to consider the high volatility and conduct thorough due diligence before investing.

feed.title: GrabAGun digital holdings COO sells $14k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Matthew W. Vittitow, COO of GrabAGun Digital Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:PEW), sold 5,012 shares of common stock for a total of $14,133 on February 13, 2026. These sales were made to cover tax withholding obligations related to restricted stock units and were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The company has also recently announced new initiatives, including accepting cryptocurrency payments and expanding its product offerings through a partnership with Silencer Shop.

feed.title: InflaRx Spotlights Izicopan HS Data, Phase 2b Plans and 30% Cost Cuts at Guggenheim Summit
feed.summary: InflaRx highlighted promising Phase 2a data for its oral C5aR1 antagonist izicopan in hidradenitis suppurativa (HS), noting rapid reductions in draining tunnels and pain, and plans a regulatory-engaged Phase 2b study with dose selection supported by new long-term toxicology data. The company also announced a 30% reduction in fixed costs after deprioritizing its vilobelimab antibody program. InflaRx aims to discuss the final Phase 2b design and strategic options at an upcoming Capital Markets Day in spring.

feed.title: Jet.AI adopts stockholder rights plan to protect against hostile takeovers
feed.summary: Jet.AI Inc. has adopted a limited duration stockholder rights agreement, often called a "poison pill," to protect itself from hostile takeover attempts. This plan allows existing shareholders to buy additional shares at a discount if any entity acquires 10% or more of the company's stock, thereby diluting the acquirer's ownership. The company, facing a significant stock price drop and currently valued at $6.37 million, emphasizes this measure aims to ensure fair treatment for all stockholders and encourage negotiations with its board.

feed.title: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. Notice of April 6, 2026 Application Deadline for Class Action Lawsuit - Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq. at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, Before Application Deadline
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has notified investors in Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (RARE) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges securities fraud between August 3, 2023, and December 26, 2025, during which the company's shares dropped significantly after its Phase 3 Orbit and Cosmic studies for setrusumab failed to meet statistical significance for reducing fracture rates. Investors who suffered losses have until April 6, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit, Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP Announces
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP announced a class action lawsuit against Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: RARE) for alleged violations of the Securities Exchange Act. Investors who purchased Ultragenyx common stock between August 3, 2023, and December 26, 2025, and suffered substantial losses, have until April 6, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit claims Ultragenyx made misleading statements and failed to disclose risks regarding its Phase III Orbit and Cosmic studies, which ultimately did not achieve statistical significance for their primary endpoints, leading to significant stock price drops.

feed.title: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Class Action Update
feed.summary: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. is facing a class action lawsuit alleging false or misleading statements regarding its Osteogenesis Imperfecta (OI) study, which led to significant stock price drops following negative trial results. Investors who purchased stock between August 3, 2023, and December 26, 2025, have until April 6, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status. Despite these legal challenges, analysts hold mixed views, with some maintaining an "Overweight" rating while others have lowered price targets due to regulatory hurdles and a recent workforce reduction.

feed.title: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. Notice of April 13, 2026 Application Deadline for Class Action Lawsuit - Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq. at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, Before Application Deadline
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has announced a class action lawsuit against Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: KD) with an application deadline of April 13, 2026. The lawsuit seeks to recover losses for investors affected by alleged securities fraud between August 7, 2024, and February 9, 2026. This follows Kyndryl's disclosure of material weaknesses in internal controls and the departure of its CFO and General Counsel, which led to a significant drop in its stock price.

feed.title: Weitz Investment Cuts Alphabet Class C Stake by 92,700
feed.summary: Weitz Investment Management, led by Wallace Weitz, recently reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by 92,700 shares. Despite this, Alphabet Class C has seen significant gains over the past year and maintains a StrongBuy consensus among analysts, with an "Outperform" rating from TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, driven by strong financial performance. The stock's valuation and potential CapEx risks are noted as tempering factors.

feed.title: Assessing Whether KeyCorp (KEY) Remains Undervalued After Recent Revenue And Earnings Results
feed.summary: KeyCorp (KEY) recently reported annual revenue of US$7,007.0 million and net income of US$1,685.0 million. Despite a strong 23.16% 90-day share price return, an analysis by Simply Wall St suggests the stock is 10.6% undervalued, with a fair value of $24.29 compared to its current price of $21.70. This valuation is based on projections for revenue growth, higher profit margins, and a richer earnings multiple, although it highlights potential risks related to asset quality and loan demand.

feed.title: Gartner (IT) Margin Reset To 11.2% Challenges Bullish Earnings Narratives
feed.summary: Gartner (IT) concluded FY 2025 with Q4 revenue of US$1.8 billion and basic EPS of US$3.36, but saw its net profit margin reset to 11.2% from 20% the prior year. This margin compression and a drop in trailing EPS from US$16.4 to US$9.7 cast doubt on bullish narratives, despite forecasts for future earnings growth and a perceived undervaluation based on DCF. Investors are now questioning whether the lower margin is a temporary setback or a sign of increasing pressure on profitability.

feed.title: Klarna Group plc Notice of February 20, 2026 Application Deadline for Class Action Lawsuit - Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq. at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, Before Application Deadline
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has issued a notice regarding a class action lawsuit against Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR), advising investors who purchased Klarna securities in connection with its September 2025 IPO to contact the firm. The lawsuit alleges that Klarna and its executives failed to disclose material information in the Registration Statement, particularly regarding the risk of increased loss reserves for its "buy now, pay later" loans. Investors have until February 20, 2026, to request to be appointed lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Short Interest in Paramount Gold Nevada Corp. (NYSEAMERICAN:PZG) Increases By 77.4%
feed.summary: Short interest in Paramount Gold Nevada Corp. (NYSEAMERICAN:PZG) significantly increased by 77.4% to 642,447 shares as of January 30th. This represents about 0.9% of the company's shares shorted, with a low days-to-cover ratio of 0.2, indicating quick turnover. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for the stock, setting a consensus price target of $3.25.

feed.title: IPG Photonics Corporation (NASDAQ:IPGP) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: IPG Photonics Corporation (NASDAQ:IPGP) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, beating expectations with revenue up 17% year-over-year, driven by industrial demand stabilization and growth in medical and advanced applications. The company saw its first full-year revenue growth since 2021 and made significant progress expanding beyond materials processing, particularly in medical and directed energy with the launch of the Crossbow laser defense system. IPG Photonics is focused on strategic initiatives to strengthen core industrial applications and penetrate new non-industrial high-growth markets, maintaining a strong balance sheet and balanced capital allocation.

feed.title: enVVeno Medical Announces Reverse Stock Split
feed.summary: enVVeno Medical Corporation announced a 1-for-35 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective January 20, 2026. This move aims to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements and is part of a broader plan to enhance shareholder value and strengthen its position in treating deep venous disease. The split will reduce outstanding shares from approximately 22.9 million to 655 thousand, with fractional shares paid in cash.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets declares first-quarter 2026 dividend of $0.72 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.72 per share for the first quarter of 2026, payable on March 13, 2026. The company has a strong record of dividend payments, maintaining them for 16 consecutive years and raising them for 11 years. This announcement follows their solid Q4 2025 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations.
